case_title: MALTA & CO. INC. vs. ZALDIVAR, JESUS et al

docket_entries.description: JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL COVER SHEET FILED BY PLTF.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ZALDIVAR, JESUS ZALDIVAR, IMELDA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZALDIVAR, JESUS ZALDIVAR, IMELDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 401 NAPLES STREET, S.F., LEASE FORFEITED, STAYED TILL 5PM 1/31/98. NO FURTHER STAYS. DEFTS WAIVE RIGHT TO RECOVER SECURITY DEPOSIT. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND FEES. PLTF DOES NOT RECOVER MONEYS FOR BACK RENT & DAMAGES.
